_readme: Claude Code settings template for a React frontend project (CRA, Vite, or Next.js).
_usage: Copy to .claude/settings.json in your project root. Adjust allow/deny rules to match your project structure.
_hook_note: This template references check-naming-conventions.sh. Copy it first: cp vthink-claudecode-toolkit/hooks/pre-tool/check-naming-conventions.sh .claude/hooks/pre-tool/ && chmod +x .claude/hooks/pre-tool/check-naming-conventions.sh
